summary: Added 5 tools & companies, 15 case studies, South Korea AI Act, 2 learn resources, and 2 news sources.

items: Copy.ai — AI-powered GTM marketing platform (17M+ users)
Azure AI Speech — Microsoft enterprise TTS/STT (400+ voices, 140+ languages)
Anysphere (Cursor) — $9.9B valuation, 64% Fortune 500 penetration
Black Forest Labs (Flux) — Founded by Stable Diffusion creators
Suno — $5.4B valuation, AI music generation
Cognition AI (Devin) — $4B valuation, AI software engineer
Vercel — $3.25B valuation, v0 AI design tool
StackBlitz — Bolt.new full-stack AI coding
Microsoft 365 Copilot — $10B+ ARR, 29% faster email processing
Stripe Radar — ML fraud on $1T+ annual payments
DeepMind/NHS — AI eye disease detection matching senior ophthalmologists
Rolls-Royce TotalCare — 5-8% engine on-wing life extension
DHL AI Logistics — €300M+ annual savings
Walmart AI Supply Chain — $1B+ inventory savings
Tesla Autopilot/FSD — 600M+ miles/day autonomous data
Adobe Firefly — 12B+ images generated, IP indemnification
South Korea AI Basic Act — enacted Jan 2024, in force Jan 2026, first comprehensive AI law in East Asia outside China
Brazil AI Bill (PL 2338/2023) — Senate-passed, EU AI Act-inspired framework for 215M citizens
Hugging Face Deep RL Course — free, 70K+ learners, DQN/PPO/Policy Gradient
AWS Skill Builder ML Foundations — free, SageMaker & Bedrock hands-on labs
Kaggle Learn — free interactive ML micro-courses
AI Agents in LangGraph — DeepLearning.AI agentic AI course
Build a Large Language Model From Scratch — Sebastian Raschka 2024
